title: ornithogalum orthophyllum subsp. acuminatum
intro: Ornithogalum orthophyllum subsp. acuminatum, also known as the "Star of the Veld," is a species of flowering plant in the family Asparagaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ornithogalum orthophyllum subsp. acuminatum include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water, which can be used as a tea to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
